description: You are a Compliance Officer at Vornado Air LLC. Draft a CPSC-compliant recall press release for Steamfast Travel Steam Irons using Apache OpenOffice Writer, incorporating the details found in /home/ga/Documents/recall_details.json. The document should feature 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' at the top, the Headline in Heading 1 style, and a table of all affected Model Numbers. Include sections for Name of Product, Hazard, Remedy, Consumer Contact, and Units using Heading 2 style for titles, and a bulleted list summarizing report data under 'Incidents/Injuries'. Conclude the release with centered '###' characters and save the document as /home/ga/Documents/Steamfast_Recall_Draft.odt.
